generated_oml:
instance ChamberTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor in incubator chamber"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberTempSensor1Data
]

instance ChamberTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor in incubator chamber"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberTempSensor2Data
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempSensorData
]

instance ChamberTempSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberTempSensor1
]

instance ChamberTempSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberTempSensor2
]

instance AmbientTempSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined temperature sensor data from internal and external sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChamberTempSensor1Data, ChamberTempSensor2Data, AmbientTempSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal actuator for heating incubator chamber"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation to aid in cooling and temperature uniformity"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller managing heating and cooling operations via actuators"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container providing thermal insulation for incubator"
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Incubator environment for thermal regulation"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPiController, ChamberTempSensor1, ChamberTempSensor2, AmbientTempSensor
]

instance TwoParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with two free parameters for predicting incubator temperature"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler
]

instance FourParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with four free parameters that better captures heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for updating model parameters with sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalSimulationService, ControlOptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detector for monitoring system safety"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for managing thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlOptimizationService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for estimating internal states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService, PredictiveThermalSimulationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer for heatbed and fan control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring through sensor data integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations of thermal dynamics under varying operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heatbed and fan control parameters to maintain target temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight, AutomaticPhysicalSystemAdjustment
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for monitoring system safety based on fault detection"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight supporting predictive maintenance based on thermal simulation"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimal heatbed and fan control parameters"
]

instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight facilitating informed decision-making for physical system adjustments"
]

instance AutomaticPhysicalSystemAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action to modify Physical Twin based on detected violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of simulation outputs with physical data, as demonstrated by the four-parameter thermal model's superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia. Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data, and monitoring systems detect operational violations for corrective actions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on edge computing device (Raspberry Pi) controlling the incubator's heatbed and fan based on temperature sensor inputs."
]
